old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-7fqg","title":"Converge recovery integration branches","description":"Inventory every commit on all recovery integration branches, map each to Beads and overlapping paths, classify it as integrate/superseded/drop/blocked, then construct one clean convergence branch from origin/main in dependency order. Resolve conflicts deliberately, run complete cross-language validation and reviews, and prepare the final merge boundary without merging the checkpoint wholesale.","design":"Use cherry-picked logical slices, not octopus or wholesale sibling merges. Preserve the checkpoint branch as evidence only. Integrate foundations and fail-closed CI first, then node/link/OSCORE/Python transport work, then SCHC/Zephyr, then reconcile Rust prefix and RPL branches at the API level. Validate after each conflict-bearing slice and perform final workspace/API reviews.","acceptance_criteria":"Every unique commit on the eight integration branches has a reviewed disposition and rationale; one clean convergence branch contains all non-superseded work with no machine-local artifacts; Rust/Python/Zephyr/vector/fleet gates and three final reviews pass; residual blockers are explicit; branch is pushed only when authorized.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-07-21T00:52:46.189019425Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-21T00:52:46.189019425Z"}

new_value: {"design":"CONVERGENCE FREEZE. Fixed inputs are origin/main plus the eight inventoried integration branch tips at cutoff ba388efc1367afaf491b5d95e83669824323aa24. Every applied change must trace to an inventoried commit hash. Conflict resolution may only preserve or reconcile behavior already present in selected commits; no frontier features, opportunistic refactors, cleanup, or unrelated bug fixes. Newly discovered work is filed as a Beads issue and deferred or used to block the affected slice. A validation correction is permitted only when necessary to preserve a selected commit's documented acceptance behavior and must be recorded against that hash before editing. Do not run or claim unrelated bd ready work until this epic closes. Maintain the commit-disposition ledger and checkpoint it after each integration slice.","notes":"User explicitly identified prior scope drift from merge recovery into frontier coding. Treat any untraced product edit as a stop condition. The convergence branch is not a development frontier."}
